## Commit message format

- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits with package scope: `feat(package): description`
- [ ] Examples: `feat(embedeer): add idle timeout`, `fix(seedeer): correct proto path`

---

**Before merging, ensure:**
- ✅ All tests pass
- ✅ Changeset present (or explicitly skipped)
- ✅ Documentation updated
- ✅ No breaking changes (or documented & approved)
